properties.displayName: Browser-Downloaded File Executed from Suspicious Directory (Rapid Execution)
properties.description:
Detects a browser writing an executable, script, or DLL to a user-writable directory (AppData, ProgramData, Public, Windows\Temp) followed by execution within a short time window. Correlation is performed via SHA256 hash, full path in command line, or filename in command line - catching both direct execution and interpreter-based launches (powershell.exe, cmd.exe, wscript.exe, mshta.exe, rundll32.exe).

This pattern is consistent with content injection delivery, but may also indicate phishing or drive-by compromise. Triage should review the originating URL, parent process chain, and file reputation. Severity is set by time-to-execute - 10s or less = High, 60s or less = Medium, longer = Low.

MITRE ATT&CK:
T1659 - Content Injection - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1659/
T1204.002 - User Execution Malicious File - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1204/002/
T1105 - Ingress Tool Transfer - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1105/
properties.query:
let LookbackWindow = 45min; 
 let ExecutionWindow = 15min;
 let SuspiciousPaths = dynamic([
     @"\AppData\Roaming\",
     @"\AppData\Local\",
     @"\AppData\Local\Temp\",
     @"\AppData\Local\Packages\",
     @"\Windows\Temp\",
     @"\Users\Public\",
     @"\ProgramData\"
 ]);
 let BrowserProcesses = dynamic([
     "chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe",
     "opera.exe","opera_gx.exe","iexplore.exe","vivaldi.exe",
     "arc.exe","browser.exe","librewolf.exe","waterfox.exe",
     "tor.exe","duckduckgo.exe"
 ]);
 let ExecutableExtensions = dynamic([
     "exe","dll","ps1","bat","cmd","vbs","vbe","js","jse",
     "wsf","wsh","hta","scr","lnk","msi","cpl","pif"
 ]);
 let FileCreated =
     DeviceFileEvents
     | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackWindow)
     | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
     | where FolderPath has_any (SuspiciousPaths)
     | extend FileExtension = tolower(extract(@"\.([^.]+)$", 1, FileName))
     | where FileExtension in (ExecutableExtensions)
     | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (BrowserProcesses)
     | project
         CreationTime      = TimeGenerated,
         DeviceId,
         DeviceName,
         CreatedFileName   = FileName,
         CreatedFilePath   = FolderPath,
         CreatedFileSHA256 = SHA256,
         FileOriginUrl,
         FileOriginReferrerUrl,
         FileOriginIP,
         BrowserProcess    = InitiatingProcessFileName,
         BrowserCmdLine    = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
         BrowserPID        = InitiatingProcessId,
         CreatorAccount    = InitiatingProcessAccountName;
 let FileExecuted =
     DeviceProcessEvents
     | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackWindow)
     | project
         ExecutionTime      = TimeGenerated,
         DeviceId,       
         ExecutedFileName   = FileName,
         ExecutedFilePath   = FolderPath,
         ExecutedFileSHA256 = SHA256,
         ProcessCmdLine     = ProcessCommandLine,
         ParentProcess      = InitiatingProcessFileName,
         ParentCmdLine      = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
         ExecutedByAccount  = AccountName;
 FileCreated
 | join kind=inner FileExecuted on DeviceId
 | where ExecutionTime between (CreationTime .. (CreationTime + ExecutionWindow))
 | where 
     CreatedFileSHA256 == ExecutedFileSHA256
     or ProcessCmdLine has CreatedFilePath
     or ProcessCmdLine has CreatedFileName
 | extend SecondsToExecute = datetime_diff('second', ExecutionTime, CreationTime)
 | extend MatchType =
     case(
         CreatedFileSHA256 == ExecutedFileSHA256, "SHA256 match",
         ProcessCmdLine has CreatedFilePath, "Command line path match",
         ProcessCmdLine has CreatedFileName, "Command line filename match",
         "Unknown"
     )
 | extend Severity =
     case(
         SecondsToExecute <= 10, "High",
         SecondsToExecute <= 60, "Medium",
         "Low"
     )
 | extend HashAlgorithm = "SHA256"
 | distinct
     CreationTime,
     ExecutionTime,
     SecondsToExecute,
     Severity,
     MatchType,
     DeviceName,
     BrowserProcess,
     BrowserCmdLine,
     CreatedFileName,
     CreatedFilePath,
     CreatedFileSHA256,
     HashAlgorithm,
     FileOriginUrl,
     FileOriginReferrerUrl,
     FileOriginIP,
     ExecutedFileName,
     ExecutedFilePath,
     ExecutedFileSHA256,
     ParentProcess,
     ParentCmdLine,
     ProcessCmdLine,
     ExecutedByAccount
 | sort by CreationTime desc
